name: Cross-Repo Review Tools Installer
description: Bash installer that wires automated code review across a repo — drops in stack-appropriate Danger, CodeRabbit, and SonarCloud config plus a Dangerfile template tuned for the detected runtime (Node, Python, Go, or mixed). Runs idempotent — re-running re-applies the latest templates without duplicating CI jobs. Best for trunk-based monorepos and feature branches that want CodeRabbit-grade review on every PR without per-repo manual setup.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Instalador de Ferramentas de Review Multi-Repo
pt-BR.description: Instalador em bash que conecta review automatizado de código em um repo — solta as configs adequadas de Danger, CodeRabbit e SonarCloud por stack, além de um Dangerfile template ajustado para o runtime detectado (Node, Python, Go ou misto). Roda de forma idempotente — re-executar reaplica os templates mais recentes sem duplicar jobs de CI. Ideal para monorepos trunk-based e branches de feature que querem review nível CodeRabbit em todo PR sem setup manual por repo.
